message:
feat(comparison): Enhanced structural variant detection with inline synteny analysis

Major refactoring of the structural variant detection system to provide
more accurate SV calling with a self-contained synteny block algorithm,
plus a new UI for displaying detailed SV call information.

## Structural Variants Algorithm Overhaul

### Removed External Dependency
- Remove import of alignSynteny from synteny module
- Implement local buildSyntenyBlocks() function for SV-specific needs
- Allows fine-tuned parameters optimized for variant detection

### New Gene Matching System
Optimized fuzzy gene matching for synteny block construction:
- preprocessGene(): Tokenize gene names/products into searchable terms
- geneDistanceOptimized(): Fast three-tier distance calculation:
  - Exact match: 0.0 distance
  - Substring containment: 0.2 distance
  - Shared token: 0.5 distance
  - No match: 1.0 distance

### Synteny Block Builder
New buildSyntenyBlocks() implementation with:
- Configurable minimum score threshold for candidate matches
- Maximum step parameters (maxStepA, maxStepB) for block extension
- Minimum block matches requirement for block validity
- Orientation detection (forward/reverse) for inversion calling
- Greedy best-first matching with used-set deduplication

### Improved Numeric Safety
- clamp01(): Now checks Number.isFinite() instead of Number.isNaN()
- geneRange(): Handle inverted index ranges correctly
- collectGenes(): Use min/max bounds for proper overlap detection

## Comparison Overlay UI Enhancements

### New SV Call Display
Interactive expandable panels for each structural variant call:
- Type badge with semantic coloring:
  - Deletion: error (red)
  - Insertion: info (blue)
  - Inversion/Duplication/Translocation: warning (yellow)
- Confidence percentage display
- Genomic coordinates for both genomes (A and B)
- Size comparison in base pairs

### Expanded Call Details
Click to expand and view:
- Evidence array (analysis methods that detected the variant)
- Affected genes in genome A
- Affected genes in genome B

### Sorting and Display
- Calls sorted by confidence (highest first)
- Secondary sort by variant size (largest first)
- Empty state message when no SVs detected

### Helper Functions
- formatBpRange(): Locale-aware base pair range formatting
- formatConfidence(): Percentage display with fallback
- svBadgeVariant(): Map SV types to Badge color variants
- sortSvCalls(): Multi-criteria sorting comparator

## Type Imports
Added StructuralVariantCall and StructuralVariantType to ComparisonOverlay
imports for type-safe SV handling.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
